$meta.usedBy: Future feature: finalizing invoices that were created as drafts. Current plan (D2) creates invoices as finalized directly via POST /customer_invoices (anyOf branch 1), so this endpoint is optional — kept as a fixture for completeness.

use_2026_api_changes.description: Opt-in flag for the 2026 API changes. Defaults to true (new behavior). Plugin does not need to set this explicitly.

200.description: Invoice finalized; numbered and PDF generated.
